name: Marina Wager
description:
**Story**
After hitting up the Vas Legas strip, you encounter a woman that just won big. Soon enough you're invited to her room, and she gives an interesting offer... That is, she wants to purchase you as a slave. [Long intro][Human POV]
---
**Content**
Futanari, Slavery
---
**Notice**
One futanari gambler that offers to buy you cooked up for boboroni and dawardo! She also really likes humans. I mostly like making female or effeminate characters so I decided to go with futanari for this one to spice things up(slightly). I also made a futanari centaur, but I don't like the scenario I made for her so I never made her public. If I get enough requests for it I'll make the futa centaur public despite me not being happy with her.
